Admin access
This app is a single HTML file. No server software is required for basic use. To share it across your office network or remotely, follow the options below.

Current deployment info

Detected access mode
—
Current URL / origin
—

Option 1 — Local network (office / same Wi-Fi) · Recommended

Host the app on one Windows PC so everyone on the same network (office LAN or Wi-Fi) can open it on any device — Windows laptops, Android phones, tablets.

Step-by-step setup on the host PC
Android access: On any Android phone connected to the same Wi-Fi, open Chrome and type the URL shown above (e.g., http://192.168.1.x:8000). The app opens instantly — no installation needed.

Option 2 — Remote access from other locations

For staff working from home, field agents, or accessing from Cebu/Manila/other offices.

Angrok (easiest, free)

Tunnels your local server to a public URL in seconds. No router config needed.

BGitHub Pages (free, permanent)

Host the HTML file permanently online. Accessible anywhere, any device, always-on.

CVPN (most secure)

Connect remote users to the office network as if they were on-site.

DRouter port forwarding

Forward port 8000 on your router to the host PC. Staff access via your public IP.

Android — add to home screen (app-like experience)

Once the URL is open in Chrome on Android, the app can be pinned to the home screen so it opens like a native app — full screen, no browser bar.

Quick comparison

MethodSetup difficultyCostWorks remotelyBest for

Company branding

Database & storage

All quotation and client data is stored in Google Sheets and Google Drive. Updating the app code never affects this data — it persists permanently in your Google account.
Open Google Sheets
Google Sheets ID: 1Rs79K8wX27lxVRddksNlYwdyesTCOjIhHCqH0jRMV-o

Shared Drive folder Admin sets once — all users inherit

All users must save quotation files to one shared Google Drive folder. Create a folder in Google Drive, share it with every user as Editor, then paste its ID here and click Save settings. Other users will use this folder automatically when they sign in.
How to find the folder ID: Open the folder in Google Drive → the ID is the last part of the URL: drive.google.com/drive/folders/THIS-PART

Quotation serial counter Admin only

Serial numbers are sequential and company-specific. W series (WCLI): QT-W00000001. M series (MSSI): QT-M00000001. C series (Cebu World Laminate): QT-C00000001. Resetting moves the counter forward to the new value — never backwards past existing quotations. Split from a shared W series on 2026-07-03 — existing MSSI quotations already numbered under W keep their numbers; only new MSSI quotations get the M series.
Atomic claim service (prevents duplicate numbers)
Two people saving a brand-new quotation at nearly the same moment can otherwise be handed the same number, silently overwriting each other. Paste a Google Apps Script web-app URL here to guarantee each save gets a truly unique number, with zero race window, for every user. Leave blank to use the built-in fallback check (still safe, but not fully race-proof).
Saved with Save settings. Test claim previews the next W-series number (dry run — nothing is consumed). See setup guide in project docs for the Apps Script code to paste.

Logo management Admin only

Price Database (Google Sheets)

This connects to the Modcraft Price Database Google Sheets file. Services, Materials, Hardware, and Cabinet Templates are stored there and used in BOM costing mode.
Import from Excel
Hardware
Expected columns: Name · Supplier · Price · UOM (3 header rows)
Materials
Expected columns: Name · Supplier · Price · UOM (3 header rows)
Services
Expected columns: Name · Unit · Price (1 header row)
Cabinet Templates
Expected columns: Cabinet · Category · Name · Unit · Qty · Price

Message Templates

Write the message your team sends to clients when sharing a quotation. Type freely — the words in {curly brackets} will be automatically replaced with the actual quotation details.

Auto-filled words: {client} {serial} {service} {total} {valid_until} {prepared_by} {company}

Response SLA

Working-hours SLA counted from when the Wufoo order is received to when the quotation is sent to the client.

Working Hours per Company

Response time timer only counts within these working hours. Non-working hours are paused.

Wufoo Webhook Setup

Paste your Google Apps Script web app URL below. The Apps Script receives Wufoo submissions and writes them to the Pending Orders sheet tab automatically.

This URL is informational — it is pasted into Wufoo, not called by this app. See the setup guide below.

Setup guide — 3 steps
Step 1 — Deploy the Apps Script
1. Go to script.google.com → New project
2. Paste the Apps Script code (provided separately) → click Deploy → New deployment → Web app
3. Set Execute as: Me, Who has access: Anyone → Deploy → Copy the web app URL

Step 2 — Configure the Apps Script
In the script, set SHEETS_ID to your Sheets database ID:
1Rs79K8wX27lxVRddksNlYwdyesTCOjIhHCqH0jRMV-o

Step 3 — Set up Wufoo webhook
1. In Wufoo → your form → Notifications → WebHooks
2. Paste the Apps Script URL → Save
3. Submit a test entry — it will appear in the Orders tab within seconds

Services Capacity

User access management

Positions, permissions and device binding

 Remember: Add every new user to the shared Google Drive folder
The Modcraft app saves all quotation data to a shared Google Drive folder. When you add a new user here, you must also manually give them Editor access to that folder — otherwise they won't be able to save or load quotations.
Steps 1. Open Google Drive › 2. Open Modcraft Quotations folder › 3. Right-click → Share › 4. Add the user's email → set to Editor → Send
Open folder
